summary: High‑quality soundboard recording of a stellar June ’76 show with a sweet opener, standout Scarlet Begonias and an awesome Help>Slip>Franklin's sequence, though the matrix suffers a channel‑swap quirk.
review: The performance is praised for its tight opening, a superb second set highlighted by Scarlet Begonias and a smoking Help > Slipknot! > Franklin’s Tower. Reviewers rave about the overall sound – crisp highs, deep bass and excellent mastering – but note a mild buzz and a channel‑swap issue in the matrix version. Overall the show shines despite the technical hiccup.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (stellar set, standout songs) and generally good soundboard quality offset by a notable channel‑swap problem; three reviews give consistent high praise with one technical complaint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear high end and deep bass, mild buzz present; matrix version has channels swapped (Jerry on left, Mickey on right), which may affect stereo imaging for some listeners.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Opener described as sweet, second set called stellar; overall flow praised with strong transitions and energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Drums: Channel‑swap note mentions Mickey on the right in matrix version.
